---
title: "Followers to Founders"
author: "Vincent V. Crowns"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## From Followers to Founders

```{r}
library(plm)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
```

### Import Data

```{r}
data <- read_csv("FtF_cleaned.csv")
```

### Cleaning Data

```{r}
cleaned_data <- data |>
  separate_rows(platforms, sep = ",") |> 
  separate_rows(influencers, sep = ",") |> 
  drop_na()

colSums(is.na(cleaned_data))
```

### Preprocessing

```{r}
split_data <- initial_split(cleaned_data, prop = 0.8)

train <- training(split)
test  <- testing(split)
```
